notes: Existing visual BOM plan; uses hero/SVG placeholders until P0/P1 shop photos exist.

Site copy of the hero image; concept/support only.

Existing joint section preview; joint fit still needs shop measurement before production authority.

Existing per-member body previews; final hole positions remain pending P0 and tuning loop.

Existing SolidWorks plan; no native SolidWorks files are claimed by this migration.

Existing Wolfram starter; predictions are not measured validation.
Existing Wolfram model remains pending P0 measured correction and tuning data.
Existing analysis model should be updated only from measured correction data.

Existing validation loop explicitly gates full-body schedules on P0 measurement.
Existing model note is L1 estimate only; do not use model estimates as cut authority.

Existing build-log site is documentation; it is not fabrication authority.
